query:
SELECT 
  bucketId,
  realm,
  bucketType,
  ROUND(dataQuotaMb / 1024.0, 1) as quotaGb,
  ROUND(dataUsedMb / 1024.0, 2) as usedGb,
  ROUND(dataUsedMb * 100.0 / dataQuotaMb, 1) as pctUsed,
  isOverQuota,
  simCount,
  snapshotDate,
  lastSyncedAt
FROM vocus_buckets
ORDER BY lastSyncedAt DESC;
command:

  realm,
  bucketType,
  ROUND(dataQuotaMb / 1024.0, 1) as quotaGb,
  ROUND(dataUsedMb / 1024.0, 2) as usedGb,
  ROUND(dataUsedMb * 100.0 / dataQuotaMb, 1) as pctUsed,
  isOverQuota,
  simCount,
  snapshotDate,
  lastSyncedAt
FROM vocus_buckets
ORDER BY lastSyncedAt DESC;
